data.text: M13/P05 QUARTZ SURFACE, LIGHT GREY HIGHLY REFLECTIVE WITH SMALL DARK
AREAS. A PYRAMID WAS FOUND AT 315.023, -65.26. THE BEST FINDING WAS
246.043 WHERE THERE WAS A TALL PINNACLE MOUNT AT-73.55 AND ON THE
OTHER SIDE OF THE SECTOR AT 63.52 THERE IS A MAGNIFICENT GIGANTIC CLIFF
SYSTEM WITH A ROCKY ENCLOSURE AT THE BASE. PRO 0.133.560; PRV 0.006.
